span.p: MCP HUB — governed tool gateway (tiers from OUR manifest)

span.p:
Auth · Governance · Tenancy — PORTS (black box)
webhook signatures · Slack signing · credentials ·
approval tokens · org scoping
v1 stubs: AllowAll / SingleTenant / EnvCredentials

div.style: color: rgb(11, 58, 66) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RECEIVER — no LLM, no writes
normalize to AgentEvent · fingerprint ·
dedupe · coalesce alert storms

div.style: color: rgb(52, 58, 64) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Redis Streams — inbox queue · burst absorption

div.style: color: rgb(11, 58, 66) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Orchestrator (supervisor)
intake → retrieve → dispatch →
aggregate Findings → synthesize Conclusion

div.style: color: rgb(11, 58, 66) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Agent Registry — declarative, versioned
prompt · tool allowlist · budget · dispatch triggers

div.style: color: rgb(11, 58, 66) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Specialist sub-agents — parallel · stateless · budgeted
DB Investigator · Metrics Analyst · Log Analyst
Code Investigator · Change Auditor · Precedent Researcher

div.style: color: rgb(47, 30, 92) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
retrieve(ctx) → KnowledgeBundle
GraphRAG: vectors find entry points, graph expands

div.style: color: rgb(47, 30, 92) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
① Vector store (pgvector) — episodic memory
② Knowledge graph (Postgres edges) — caused_by · fixed_by · applies_to
③ Recipe registry (YAML) — interpret → freeze → synthesize
④ Federated (MCP) — mcp-code-explorer · Curlix asset graph

div.style: color: rgb(11, 58, 66) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Read tier
skills · queries · logs · code
agents call freely

div.style: color: rgb(92, 61, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Privileged tier
destructive ops: suspend graph → approval →
single-use token (minted by Auth port)

div.style: color: rgb(61, 72, 82) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Slack approval UI
approve / deny buttons

div.style: color: rgb(61, 72, 82) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CURLIX PLATFORM (external)
skills execution · inventory / asset graph ·
findings write-back · existing MCP server

div.style: color: rgb(11, 58, 66) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ACTIONS — deterministic, no LLM
fingerprint rules: create-vs-update · idempotent
→ Linear tickets · Slack receipts · Curlix findings

div.style: color: rgb(11, 58, 66) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GOVERNOR + SCHEDULER (cross-cutting)
iteration & token budgets · circuit breakers · storm brake
registry sync · distiller runs · scheduled investigations

div.style: color: rgb(47, 30, 92) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
FLIGHT RECORDER — append-only audit spine (Postgres)
events · node transitions · every LLM + tool call · gates · actions
powers replay/eval harness + per-agent hit-rate stats

div.style: color: rgb(47, 30, 92) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Distiller — one-way, human gate on recipes
case embeddings ① · graph edges ② · draft recipes ③
